title: microsorum novae-zealandiae
intro: Microsorum novae-zealandiae, also known as New Zealand pepperwort or silver fern, is a type of fern native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Microsorum novae-zealandiae include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and topical creams, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
